nasb.text: Opposite the twenty cubits which belonged to the inner court, and opposite the pavement which belonged to the outer court, was gallery corresponding to gallery in three stories.

esv.text: Facing the twenty cubits that belonged to the inner court, and facing the pavement that belonged to the outer court, was gallery against gallery in three stories.

cnv.text: 這些房子一排對著內院十公尺寬的空地，一排對著外院的鋪石地，在三層樓上，都有走廊對著走廊。

ccb.text: 内院十米宽的空地和外院的铺石地对面有三层高的走廊彼此相对。
